name: 4pc Fridge & Pantry Bin Storage Set Clear - Brightroom™: Refrigerator & Pantry Organizers, Hand Washable
description:
Keep your fridge or pantry organized with this 4-Piece Fridge & Pantry Bin Storage Set from Brightroom™. Made from BPA-free material, this set includes four different sized storage containers, each featuring a rectangular silhouette with an open-top design for easy access to the contents. Featuring a clear design to ensure the contents always stay visible, these fridge storage bins can be used to store anything from fresh fruits or vegetables to soda bottles or packaged food packets to maximize the storage space in your fridge or pantry.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.



9"x 10.5"x 4" Wide Fridge & Pantry Bin Clear - Brightroom and

4.5"x 10.5"x 4" Small Fridge & Pantry Bin Clear - Brightroom
